title: Commodities rebound as sentiment improves
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
An improving mood across markets saw commodity markets stabilise after the recent sell-off. The improving sentiment saw metals push higher, while energy remained well bid amid supply side issues. Base metals rebounded as sentiment improved across commodity markets.
